# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Blob Storage to store application logs and backups. Configure for standard performance tier with default access settings. Skip lifecycle management policies for now to keep the template simple. This is for our logging infrastructure.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

resources:
- name: AppLogsStorageAccount
  type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
  apiVersion: 2023-01-01
  location: your_location
  sku:
    name: Standard_LRS
  accessTier: Hot
  properties:
    allowBlobPublicAccess: false
    defaultToOAuthAuthentication: false
    minimumTlsVersion: TLS1_2
    encryption:
      services:
        blob:
          enabled: true
        queue:
          enabled: false
        table:
          enabled: false
      keyManagement:
        serverSideEncryption:
          enabled: true

- name: AppLogsContainer
  type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers
  apiVersion: 2023-01-01
  dependsOn:
    - AppLogsStorageAccount
  properties:
    containerAcl:
      accessPolicies:
        - access: ReadWrite
          permissions:
            read: true
            write: true
            delete: true
          identity:
            type: Application
            objectId: your_app_object_id

outputs:
  storageAccountName: AppLogsStorageAccount.name
  containerName: AppLogsContainer.name
